raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Evocatively reassuring the listener of a predictable, pleasurable daily rhythm of appetite and moderate eating through stylized affirmation.",
  "implicit_claims": ["Hunger reliably occurs three times daily at conventional meal times", "Hunger manifests as an agreeable anticipatory sensation rather than discomfort", "Eating will be enjoyed in moderation without overindulgence"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent, presenting a closed, self-reinforcing cycle of sensation, anticipation, and moderated action with no internal contradictions.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The recipient values stylized, affirmative descriptions of ordinary bodily routines and seeks light reassurance about normal appetite patterns.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If read as a factual prediction or binding promise rather than figurative evocation, especially for those with atypical eating schedules, disorders, or literal interpretive expectations."
}

Eating will be enjoyed in moderation without overindulgence
